custom.different_heap_sizes: You have allocated $XMS$ as the Starting heap size, but $XMX$ as the Maximum heap size. This is likely to decrease the game's stability, and it's highly recommended to set these to the same value.
custom.java_too_old: You are using a very old build of Java ($VERSION$). This is likely to cause various elusive bugs. Please update your Java or install Cleanroom Relauncher to upgrade to Cleanroom automatically.
custom.cleanroom_recommended: You are using Java $VERSION$. While this is supported, it is recommended to use Cleanroom and Java 25 for performance boosts.
custom.essential_incompatible: Essential is not compatible with the pack. Consider installing E4MC-Retro or using a dedicated server!
